case_title: LUCIA S. MARTINEZ VS. AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT(SFPD) TO JAN-18-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(SFPD)**GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO MAR-22-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUCIA S. MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY (CLAIMS ADJUSTOR FOR CCSF). CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2023 - JUDGMENT. (525)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, LUCIA S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. FILED BY DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PLANTIFF'S CLAIM & ORDER, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, LUCIA S. SERVED OCT-20-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-20-2022 AS TO DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT REGARDING REQUEST TO POSTPONE REQUESTED BY DEFENDANT IS DENIED.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2023 - CONTINUED FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE HEARING TO MAY-24-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUCIA S. MARTINEZ IS PRESENT WITH AMANDA LAUS (LEGAL AID VOLUNTEER TO ASS PLAINTIFF). DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN (VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QA). DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY (CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR CCSF). SMALL CLAIMS COURT DOES NOT ALLOW LEGAL AID ASSISTING CLAIMANT IN OPEN COURT. CASE IS CONTINUED TO WEDNESDAY, MAY 24, 2023 AT 3:30 P.M. FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE HEARING. DEFENDANT SFPD WILL REVIEW THE CITY'S 311 LOGS TO DETERMINE IF PLAINTIFF FORMALLY SUBMITTED FOR A HOMELESS FEE WAIVER TO OBTAIN THE RETURN OF HER IMPOUNDED CAR. DEFENDANT SFPD DECLARATION REQUEST MAILING ADDRESS CHANGE IS FILED AND MAILING ADDRESS IS UPDATED IN THE SYSTEM BY COURTROOM CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY-24-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 525. TO ALLOW THE CASE TO GO BEFORE THE ORIGNIAL HEARING OFFICER. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2023 - PLAINTIFF LUCIA S. MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN (VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QA). DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY NICHELLE FLENTROY (CLAIMS ADJUSTER FOR CCSF). OFFICER M. SEAVEY APPEARING AS WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT SFPD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (525)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-01-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUCIA S. MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP EMERITUS, TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. AMANDA LAUS (INTERN AT LEGAL AID FOR PLAINTIFF) INFORMS THE COURT WITH PAPERWORK THAT PLAINTIFF IS NOT ABLE TO APPEAR IN COURT TODAY DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTHER UNEXPECTANTLY PASSED AWAY AND HAVE TO TRAVEL TO HONDURAS TO HANDLE BUSINESS RELATED TO HER MOTHER'S PASSING AT THIS TIME. DEFENDANTS AUTORETURN SAN FRANCISCO, LLC AND SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT AGREED TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL MAR-08-2023 CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO DEFENDANT(SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT)(SEE ENVOLOPE FOR DETAIL)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, LUCIA S.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) SERVED NOV-03-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
